summary: Classified the PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact and deterministic validator repair. This is not a dedupe cluster, no shared canonical was chosen, no close/merge/fix path is allowed by the job, and security-sensitive primary items are quarantined with exact-ref route_security actions.
